sub_pixel_system.notes: Not a platformer; primarily art/animation/music creation tool. No documented sub-pixel movement system.

special_mechanics.name: Gnat Attack Minigame
special_mechanics.description: Fly-swatting point-and-click minigame requiring player to swat 100 insects before fighting boss King Watinga. Three levels with increasing enemy speed and aggression.

special_mechanics.name: Mouse Control
special_mechanics.description: Game uses SNES Mouse peripheral for all interactions. Cursor-based point-and-click interface for drawing, animation, music composition, and minigame play.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative) - Mario Paint is not a platformer or action game with documented physics parameters. No player character movement mechanics, gravity, or jump physics exist. Game is art creation/animation/music composition software with a point-and-click minigame. Movement parameters are not applicable to this title.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Mario Paint article)
